name: SpotifyPlayPause
description: Auto play/pause Spotify based on screen state and audio output device. Pauses when headphones disconnect or screen sleeps; resumes on wake. Includes a 'pause for N hours' menubar item.
author: Cato Kolås <cato.kolas@gmail.com>

config.label: Preferred audio devices
config.description: Substrings (case-insensitive) matched against audio device names. Devices that match are treated as 'headphones' for play/pause logic and as auto-switch candidates.

config.label: Auto-switch audio output
config.description: On audio device list changes, switch the default output to the first available preferred device.

config.label: Respect manual pause
config.description: Only auto-resume on screen wake if this Spoon was the one that paused Spotify (i.e. user didn't manually pause).

config.label: Show menubar dropdown
config.description: Show a menubar item with 'Pause Spotify for N hours' entries.

config.label: Pause-hours entries
config.description: Number of hour entries offered in the menubar dropdown (1..N).

config.label: Spoken feedback
config.description: Speak transitions (pause / resume / arm / expire) via hs.speech.

config.label: Re-evaluate debounce
config.description: Seconds to wait after the last screen/audio event before re-evaluating play/pause. Coalesces the burst of events at wake (while headphones reconnect and the audio route settles) so playback resumes once, cleanly, instead of thrashing.
